message:
chore: ignore accidental /test file in .gitignore

Add /test to .gitignore to catch ephemeral test files accidentally
created at the repo root by shell commands or agent output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,3 +47,6 @@ target_*/
 ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
+
+# Accidental shell output
+/test
